core_mechanism: real-space renormalization-group (recursive coarse-graining) on a self-similar hierarchical structure, whose singular fixed point yields an anomalous power-law scaling exponent for a random-walk / diffusion process
brief_reason: The abstract derives the anomalous mean-square-displacement exponent d_w of random walks on hierarchical (Hanoi) networks directly from a singular renormalization-group fixed point with a boundary layer, making recursive coarse-graining of the walk on a self-similar medium the central machinery.
